title: How much credit utilisation is healthy?
question_body: Community question about how much credit utilisation is healthy?
answer_body: Keeping reported utilisation under about 30%, and ideally under 10%, helps your score.

title: How can I improve my credit score?
question_body: Community question about how can i improve my credit score?
answer_body: Pay on time, keep utilisation low, avoid unnecessary applications and check your reports for errors.

title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: Compare the card APR with your expected after-tax return. Above roughly 8-10% APR, paying the debt almost always wins.
combined_text: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing? Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing? Compare the card APR with your expected after-tax return. Above roughly 8-10% APR, paying the debt almost always wins. credit-card debt investing

title: How do I get out of credit card debt fastest?
question_body: Community question about how do i get out of credit card debt fastest?
answer_body: List balances, attack the highest APR first (avalanche), and stop new charges while you repay.
combined_text: How do I get out of credit card debt fastest? Community question about how do i get out of credit card debt fastest? List balances, attack the highest APR first (avalanche), and stop new charges while you repay. credit-card debt budgeting

title: What should I do if I think an investment is a scam?
question_body: Community question about what should i do if i think an investment is a scam?
answer_body: Stop sending money, preserve all records, verify registration with the regulator, and report the suspected fraud.

title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: Pay off high-interest credit card debt before investing. A guaranteed ~20% avoided interest usually beats uncertain market returns.

title: What records do I need for investment taxes?
question_body: Community question about what records do i need for investment taxes?
answer_body: Keep trade confirmations, cost basis, dividend statements and broker 1099s; reconstruct basis before you sell.

title: What fees matter when choosing an ETF?
question_body: Community question about what fees matter when choosing an etf?
answer_body: A 0.5% vs 0.05% expense ratio compounds into a large gap over decades.
